zh.lifeSummary: William de Trussebut是Geoffrey de Trussebut和Unknown的兒子，於大約1090年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦特。他於1116年與Rohese FitzPayn在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1138年在英國英格蘭越可爾英格曼東普享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Trussebut was born about 1090, in Warter, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey de Trussebut and Unknown. He married Rohese FitzPayn in 1116, in Warter, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1138, in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

Il a épousé Rohese FitzPayn en 1116, à Warter, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1138, à Ingmanthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Trussebutは約1090年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワーターでGeoffrey de TrussebutとUnknownの息子として生まれた。1116年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワーターでRohese FitzPaynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1138年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアイングマンソルペで50歳で死去した。

ko.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 워터
ko.lifeSummary: William de Trussebut(은)는 대략 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워터에서 Geoffrey de Trussebut(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1116년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워터에서 Rohese FitzPayn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 잉먼소에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: вартир, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: William de Trussebut родился около 1090 г. в местности вартир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Geoffrey de Trussebut и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohese FitzPayn в 1116 г. в местности вартир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1138 г. в местности ингмантаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
